story.text:
# 🚪 Compiled AI (2026)
**gateway** · shared · knowledge

External convergence (deterministic code-generation for LLM workflow automation). Converges on Φ_inference→1 (Generator/Solver separation) and Φ_data→0 (centralized); one axis collapsing → Φ_v5→0 by the multiplicative law (C7). Read as a candidate Solver-side execution layer.
